blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 129 ft. Looking ahead, 38 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder. Models disagree — check back.
Tuesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
